assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 8), the ADF JSON contains a mention node: {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst"}} at lines 236-241, confirming the reporter @mention with the correct account ID.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 21 shows 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' extracted from the Jira issue's reporter field. This same account ID is used in the Step 8 mention node. No ProdSec configuration was required — the reporter field was read directly from the Jira issue.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ADF JSON contains a mention node: {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"}} at lines 55-59, confirming the ProdSec @mention with the correct account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec mention node appears at lines 54-60, followed by the rule ("type": "rule") at line 63, and then the Comment Footnote paragraph ('This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.12.2.') at lines 66-89. The mention is correctly positioned before the footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The Step 3 ADF output in affects-versions.md contains a mention node with id '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id', demonstrating that the ProdSec Jira account ID was successfully extracted from the Security Configuration and used in the Affects Versions correction comment.
